[tried and failed to send to 125attendees@ and recentattendees@ so taking
it to itef@ now]

While there was certainly plenty of spirited discussion about the tradeoffs
surrounding the IETF 125 location (I found myself on both sides at various
times), I was ultimately very grateful for the opportunity to visit two
places I'd not previously been. I absolutely loved the built and natural
environment and the interplay between them, and I tried to capture some of
the aesthetic in photographs. Thanks, as always, for indulging my
gratuitous sharing of the results: https://flic.kr/s/aHBqjCYWby
